notes: Issue #19, authored by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). LIVE recipe recipes/aut_bundespraesident.yml over the TYPO3 tx_news archive /aktuelles. Probe --spread: 1298 speech links, title(.news-single h1)/text(.news-single-content)/date(time@datetime) all green on samples across 2018-2026; coverage 2017-01-26 (Van der Bellen inauguration) .. present = his full term. PAGINATION IS UNUSUAL: the pager is cHash-signed (TYPO3 HMAC over params w/ site secret) so query_param cannot synthesise page URLs (404 without a valid cHash); click fails because the site's JS sets the paginator display:none and Playwright won't click a hidden element; no sitemap exists. Resolved by enumerating the 131 cHash-pinned pager pages in start_urls with pagination: none (the engine fetches each start_url and extracts links). Regenerate the start_urls list if coverage ever stops short of 2017-01-26 (walk /aktuelles following li.next a[data-nextlink] over plain HTTP). speaker_default deliberately OMITTED so the tenure crosscheck assigns speaker from country+date (feed also carries Doris Schmidauer items). country=Austria; source_url=https://www.bundespraesident.at/aktuelles; source_name=bundespraesident.at; source_type=official_gov; region=Europe; iso3n=40; content_format=fulltext.
